html:
Exclusive to:

Bat Caves are Don't Starve Together exclusive objects found in the Caves. They spawn Batilisks, thus allowing players to determine if the area contains Batilisks while also making them renewable in the Caves.

When a player comes close to a Bat Cave, a Batilisk will spawn every 20 sec to a maximum of 4 Batilisks. It takes 2 minutes for a Bat Cave to respawn a single Batilisk.

Trivia

  • Before Bat Caves were added, Batilisks were not renewable underground. They are renewable in the overworld however, since Sinkholes spawn Batilisks at Dusk and Night.
  • In the single-player version of Don't Starve, Bat Caves can be spawned using console commands. When the player comes close to a Bat Cave, a Batilisk will spawn every 0.1 sec to a maximum of 6 Batilisks. It takes 1 minutes for a Bat Cave to respawn a single Batilisk.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“I don't want to wake them.”
–Wilson
“What would happen if I dropped a match in there?”
–Willow
“It's the hidey hole for the flying mousies!”
–Wolfgang
“They're just lurking in there...”
–Wendy
“IT'S FULL OF MAMMAL POOP”
–WX-78
“This nook is actually a dwelling.”
–Wickerbottom
“Full of the little critters!”
–Woodie
“Ugh. It stinks.”
–Maxwell
“They're hiding under the stage.”
–Wigfrid
“Oooh they're hiding in there!”
–Webber
“I wouldn't want to disturb their peaceful slumber.”
–Warly
“Smells good!”
–Wormwood
“I'm gonna leave that right alone.”
–Winona
“Where the bats lie in wait.”
–Wortox
“Me not afraid, florp!”
–Wurt
“Looks like they're sleeping. Should we wake them up?”
–Walter
“Don't mind me... just passing through...”
–Wanda
Bat Caves are Don't Starve Together exclusive objects found in the Caves. They spawn Batilisks, thus allowing players to determine if the area contains Batilisks while also making them renewable in the Caves.
When a player comes close to a Bat Cave, a Batilisk will spawn every 20 sec to a maximum of 4 Batilisks. It takes 2 minutes for a Bat Cave to respawn a single Batilisk.

Before Bat Caves were added, Batilisks were not renewable underground. They are renewable in the overworld however, since Sinkholes spawn Batilisks at Dusk and Night.
In the single-player version of Don't Starve, Bat Caves can be spawned using console commands. When the player comes close to a Bat Cave, a Batilisk will spawn every 0.1 sec to a maximum of 6 Batilisks. It takes 1 minutes for a Bat Cave to respawn a single Batilisk.

'''Bat Caves''' are ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' exclusive objects found in the [[Caves]]. They spawn [[Batilisk]]s, thus allowing players to determine if the area contains Batilisks while also making them renewable in the Caves.

When a player comes close to a Bat Cave, a [[Batilisk]] will spawn every 20 sec to a maximum of 4 Batilisks. It takes 2 minutes for a Bat Cave to respawn a single Batilisk.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
*Before Bat Caves were added, Batilisks were not renewable underground. They are renewable in the overworld however, since [[Sinkhole]]s spawn Batilisks at [[Dusk]] and Night.
*In the single-player version of ''Don't Starve'', Bat Caves can be spawned using console commands. When the player comes close to a Bat Cave, a Batilisk will spawn every 0.1 sec to a maximum of 6 Batilisks. It takes 1 minutes for a Bat Cave to respawn a single Batilisk.
